judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After correctly counting reviews by 2016-registered users, the agent retrieved only the first 100 business documents from the business collection (limit 100) and then used an ad-hoc parser on the "description" field to infer categories, causing many businesses to be skipped and categories mis-extracted, which led to an incorrect top-5 list.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In call_QCTaqlxoTUnQQDN9dyk3Pbn2, the agent extracted business categories by heuristically parsing the "description" text with broad regexes and splitting on " & ", which misclassified categories (e.g., splitting "Beauty & Spas" into "Beauty") and led to incorrect aggregation, causing the final top-5 to differ from the ground truth.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the execute_python step that aggregates categories, the agent removes parenthetical qualifiers and splits on '&' (e.g., re.sub(r"\(.*?\)", '', p) and re.split(r'\s*&\s*|\s*/\s*', p)), collapsing "American (New)" to "American" and breaking "Breakfast & Brunch" into "Breakfast" and "Brunch", leading to incorrect top categories.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After correctly aggregating reviews by business for users who joined in 2016 (call_enhSIvPnTMa9Y9p6kYApNvsh), the agent merged with only the first 100 business documents and then used a brittle parsing rule in execute_python (call_5J5TpJNXz2nw0yPgmSWCppLR) that took text after the last " in " and split on commas, mistakenly treating location tokens like "FL" from business descriptions as categories, leading to an incorrect top 5.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent queried only the first 50 business documents (call_pHP5hzDbhcmGTCFpwYdO8dFq) and then used a naive description parser in execute_python (call_yp8L2JRe36ESXlX3QHQc5nhN) that produced spurious categories like "a diverse range of products" and "services in the categories of Food," leading to incorrect aggregation of review counts from the review summary (call_SLne7bzhPAWEMfT9QKRGLF52) and a wrong top-5 list.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
